svg.title: Rendering Patterns: CSR vs SSR vs SSG vs RSC
svg.desc: Visual comparison of four rendering patterns showing their data flow and timelines
svg.text: Rendering patterns — where does the work happen?
Browser does everything. Server sends an empty shell.
Server fetches data + renders HTML per request. Browser only hydrates.
HTML pre-built at deploy time. Served from CDN instantly.
Choose per component. Server components stream HTML. Client components hydrate.

g.text: async · DB access · zero JS to browser
